applied.action: Labeled the example specs explicitly as pseudocode (擬似コード, not runnable as-is) with a prominent callout. Added a '実 testid 対応表' (test-id mapping table) with the verified codebase selectors: activity-bar-files→activity-bar-button-files (ActivityBar.tsx:116), terminal-split-add→add-terminal-split (TerminalSplitContainer.tsx:164), pane-resizer-terminal-split-1→split-resizer-{idx} 0-based wrapper div (TerminalSplitContainer.tsx:251) with note that PaneResizer itself has no testid and [data-testid^=pane-resizer-] is always 0, history-pane-expand→no testid exists yet (must be added on the button inside terminal-container-expand-bar), terminal-split-pane-2 correct as-is (TerminalSplitPane.tsx:81). Updated inline pseudocode selectors and added an acceptance criterion to add data-testid=history-pane-expand as implementation scope.

Added a 'CI 統合方針' section clarifying that e2e is NOT currently in CI (ci-pr.yml/publish.yml have no Playwright step; only lint/type-check/unit/build/security-audit). Defined two explicit options: A (CI integration in-scope: new workflow required, scope limited to session-independent behavior = split UI DOM + cursor revert + localStorage worktreeId isolation, with tmux/CLI dependency constraint stated and seed/mock substitution) and B (CI out-of-scope: soften criterion to local e2e PASS). Made the acceptance criterion verifiable by requiring one of the two to be chosen in /work-plan.

Added a 'テストフィクスチャ戦略' section. Stated the 2 test worktrees depend on DB+real git+sessions but that Scenarios 1/2 only need split UI DOM + localStorage (no real session). Referenced that existing e2e (worktree-detail.spec.ts) uses a defensive if(count>0) pattern without fixtures, and specified a concrete approach: (A) seed DB with 2 worktrees, or (B) mock API responses, with a recommendation to extract a shared helper under tests/e2e/fixtures/.

Added a 'Resizer インスタンス数の正確な内訳' breakdown table: ActivityPane↔Right (1) + History↔Terminal (1) + 2 split gaps for 3 splits = 4 base; 5 only when FilePanel/Markdown is open. Corrected the old '5 instances' claim, changed the pseudocode count assertion and acceptance criterion to assert >=4 (or set up the exact config for 5), and changed AC-27 wording from '5並列' to '複数インスタンス並列'.

Added a '実行プロジェクトの限定（chromium のみ）' section noting playwright.config.ts runs chromium + Mobile Safari (iPhone 13), that PC-only split UI does not render on Mobile Safari, and that new specs must run chromium-only (--project=chromium or skip on mobile). Noted 1920x1080 viewport must be overridden independently of the Mobile Safari project. Acceptance criteria mark both specs as chromium-limited.

Softened the cursor assertion: implementation resets to '' (PaneResizer.tsx:237), so changed pseudocode and acceptance criterion to expect(cursor).not.toBe('col-resize') (expecting empty string) instead of strict toBe('default'), to avoid environment-dependent flakiness.
Noted the '3 minutes' target is a localhost guideline (not a hard requirement) and that CI runs with retries=2/workers=1 which increases time, in the acceptance criteria.

summary: All 7 Stage 1 findings (2 Must Fix, 3 Should Fix, 2 Nice to Have) applied to GitHub Issue #735. Verified every selector and CI/playwright claim directly against the codebase before editing. Preserved original Japanese structure/headings/intent; only edited and appended (no valid content deleted). Key additions: pseudocode labeling + real test-id mapping table, history-pane-expand testid as implementation scope, CI integration policy A/B making 'CI green' verifiable, fixture strategy (seed/mock), corrected resizer count breakdown (base 4 not 5), chromium-only project scoping, softened cursor assertion, and a collapsible Stage 1 review-history table for traceability.
